summary.en: World Bank firm-level survey data on business environment constraints such as finance, corruption, infrastructure, competition, informality, and firm performance.
summary.zh: 世界银行企业层级调查数据，覆盖融资、腐败、基础设施、竞争、非正规经营和企业绩效等经营环境约束。

recommendation.en: Use this for evidence about operating constraints and market friction when filling Business Model Environment, Five Forces, or BMC assumptions in emerging and developing markets.
recommendation.zh: 在新兴市场和发展中市场分析商业模式环境、五力模型或 BMC 假设时，用它补充经营约束和市场摩擦证据。

sources.label: World Bank Group · Enterprise Surveys Data
